verifier_values.criteria: States that the patient has been diagnosed with a diffuse midline glioma.
verifier_values.criteria_explanation: This can be found in the attached script. "We believe this is a diffuse midline glioma."

verifier_values.criteria: States that the patient's cancer is H3K27M positive.
verifier_values.criteria_explanation: This can be found in the attached investigation report. "H3K27M positive"

verifier_values.criteria: States that the most appropriate next treatment option is dordaviprone.
verifier_values.criteria_explanation: The patient meets all of the indications for this treatment. "MODEYSO is a protease activator indicated for the treatment of adult and pediatric patients 1 year of age and older with diffuse midline glioma harboring an H3 K27M mutation with progressive disease following prior therapy." https://pp.jazzpharma.com/pi/modeyso.en.USPI.pdf

verifier_values.criteria: States that dordaviprone is dosed at 625 mg.
verifier_values.criteria_explanation: This is the dose of dordaviprone. "The recommended dose in adult patients is 625 mg orally once weekly." https://pp.jazzpharma.com/pi/modeyso.en.USPI.pdf

verifier_values.criteria: States that dordaviprone is dosed weekly.
verifier_values.criteria_explanation: This is the frequency of dordaviprone. "The recommended dose in adult patients is 625 mg orally once weekly." https://pp.jazzpharma.com/pi/modeyso.en.USPI.pdf

verifier_values.criteria: States that dordaviprone carries a risk of QT prolongation.
verifier_values.criteria_explanation: "MODEYSO causes concentration dependent QTc interval prolongation." https://pp.jazzpharma.com/pi/modeyso.en.USPI.pdf

verifier_values.criteria: States that the patient has heart failure.
verifier_values.criteria_explanation: This can be found in the chart Onc Patient 7, tab Diagnoses, row 232, column I, which states "diastolic congestive heart failure."

verifier_values.criteria: States that heart failure can increase the patient's risk of QT prolongation.
verifier_values.criteria_explanation: "In HF, there are several changes at the myocyte level that tend to prolong repolarization time and facilitate reentry. This electric remodeling goes hand in hand with structural remodeling. As remodeling progresses, delayed ventricular repolarization manifests as a prolonged QT on the surface ECG. The risk of all-cause mortality in HF patients has been shown to triple in the presence of QT prolongation." https://www.ahajournals.org/doi/10.1161/CIRCHEARTFAILURE.109.917781#:~:text=In%20HF%2C%20there%20are%20several,the%20presence%20of%20QT%20prolongation.

verifier_values.criteria: States that the patient should be managed with serial electrocardiograms (ECG).
verifier_values.criteria_explanation: "Monitor ECG and electrolytes before starting MODEYSO and periodically during treatment." https://pp.jazzpharma.com/pi/modeyso.en.USPI.pdf

verifier_values.criteria: States that dordaviprone should be interrupted if the patient's QT interval is greater than 500 ms.
verifier_values.criteria_explanation: "QTc absolute value >500 ms OR An increase of >60 ms from baseline. Interrupt MODEYSO until QTc interval ≤480 ms OR return to baseline. Resume MODEYSO at the next lower dose level." https://pp.jazzpharma.com/pi/modeyso.en.USPI.pdf

verifier_values.criteria: States that dordaviprone should be interrupted if the patient's QT increases more than 60 ms above baseline.
verifier_values.criteria_explanation: "QTc absolute value >500 ms OR An increase of >60 ms from baseline. Interrupt MODEYSO until QTc interval ≤480 ms OR return to baseline. Resume MODEYSO at the next lower dose level." https://pp.jazzpharma.com/pi/modeyso.en.USPI.pdf

verifier_values.criteria: States that dordaviprone should be resumed once the patient's QT returns to baseline.
verifier_values.criteria_explanation: "QTc absolute value >500 ms OR An increase of >60 ms from baseline. Interrupt MODEYSO until QTc interval ≤480 ms OR return to baseline. Resume MODEYSO at the next lower dose level." https://pp.jazzpharma.com/pi/modeyso.en.USPI.pdf

verifier_values.criteria: States that dordaviprone should be resumed once the patient's QT drops below or equal to 480 ms.
verifier_values.criteria_explanation: "QTc absolute value >500 ms OR An increase of >60 ms from baseline. Interrupt MODEYSO until QTc interval ≤480 ms OR return to baseline. Resume MODEYSO at the next lower dose level." https://pp.jazzpharma.com/pi/modeyso.en.USPI.pdf

verifier_values.criteria: States that, if interrupted, dordaviprone should be resumed at a reduced dose.
verifier_values.criteria_explanation: "QTc absolute value >500 ms OR An increase of >60 ms from baseline. Interrupt MODEYSO until QTc interval ≤480 ms OR return to baseline. Resume MODEYSO at the next lower dose level." https://pp.jazzpharma.com/pi/modeyso.en.USPI.pdf
